_comment: RAT observability/v1 conformance vectors. Drives the BIDI Ingest stream: each batch of telemetry points produces one IngestResponse whose accepted/rejected counts are CUMULATIVE over the stream. A point with an empty name is rejected. Batch 1: 2 named metrics → accepted 2. Batch 2: 1 named + 1 unnamed → cumulative accepted 3, rejected 1.
